title: Border Expands Per Day
description: Pretty Self Explanatory, For Every Minecraft Day Survived The World Border Around You Expands.. This Is A Data Pack So You Can Add It To Any Minecraft World Save From 1.14 Through 1.19.3
body:
Pretty Self Explanatory, For Every Minecraft Day Survived The World Border Around You Expands.. 
This Is A Data Pack So You Can Add It To Any Minecraft World Save From 1.14 Through 1.19.3
